title: euploca toratensis
intro: Euploca toratensis, also known as toratensis or Mexican bugloss, is a plant species in the borage family (Boraginaceae) native to Mexico and Central America. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help to reduce pain and inflammation. The health benefits of Euploca toratensis include its ability to treat various conditions such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. Euploca toratensis is typically prepared as a herbal tea by infusing the leaves in hot water, or as a tincture by mixing the leaves with a solvent such as ethanol or glycerin.
